---
title: "UniRec: A Unimodular-Like Framework for Nested Recursions and Loops"
date: 2022-11-01
year: 2022
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3563333"
venue: "OOPSLA 2022"
code: ""
slides: "files/slides/oopsla2022.key"
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Charitha Saumya
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
